name: ai-security-remediation-agent
description: AI Security Remediation Agent - from vulnerability to secure GitHub PR in under 60 seconds.

scripts.dev: concurrently -k -n SERVER,CLIENT -c blue,green "npm run dev -w server" "npm run dev -w client"
scripts.build: npm run build -w server && npm run build -w client
scripts.lint: npm run lint -w server && npm run lint -w client
